## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] Hermetic suite passes.
- [ ] No network in standard tests.
- [ ] No patient data, credentials, institution-private data, or private paths.
- [ ] No institution-specific deployment material.
- [ ] Docs updated.
- [ ] Schemas updated where relevant.
- [ ] Phase plan added for major changes.
- [ ] Caller contract verified where relevant.
- [ ] Validation boundaries preserved.
- [ ] No unsupported clinical claims.
